price_integrity.method: post-hydration DOM text scan via Playwright
price_integrity.raw_api_price_zero_sentinel_note: The raw /api/search JSON returns price:0 as an internal not-disclosed sentinel for a meaningful fraction of listings (pre-existing behavior, unrelated to this migration -- confirmed identical on Preview before this deploy). The rendered UI never displays a literal '0 DH'/'0 MAD' string; zero matches found.

search_gateway_ranking_unchanged.basis: zero app/lib files changed by this mission (confirmed via git diff e9f4d7a..HEAD in section 5) -- ranking/display logic is byte-identical to pre-mission Production

console_hydration_errors.error_detail: 1 entry on /listings/137: 'Failed to load resource: 404' -- the browser's own log of the page's expected top-level 404 status, not an application/hydration/JS error. Zero errors on all 200-status pages.

known_open_items_untouched.detail: The 52 missing-provenance listing_sources rows and the 4 known ambiguous multi-source groups documented in docs/MARKET_INDEX_EXISTING_MODEL_AUDIT.md are, by construction, unchanged: listing_sources' row count is unchanged (321, exact match) and no write-capable Market Index code path was invoked (MARKET_INDEX_WRITE_ENABLED confirmed false in Production). Since no row was inserted, updated, or deleted, these pre-existing conditions could not have changed and were not independently re-derived by a fresh query in this validation.

duplicate_group_id_not_used_by_market_in.basis: property_clusters/property_cluster_members schema does not reference duplicate_group_id (confirmed in the applied SQL, section 4 of the mission); zero Market Index code path reads or writes it (unchanged runtime code)

anonymous_access_denied.method: structural proof, not a live anon-key probe (no SUPABASE_ANON_KEY available in this environment) -- the applied SQL contains zero 'create policy' statements for any of the 4 new tables (verified by re-reading the exact SQL that was applied), which under Postgres RLS semantics with RLS enabled means deny-all for every role except one with BYPASSRLS. This exact SQL, byte-identical, was live-tested with a real Supabase-style anon/authenticated/service_role model in Gate B and confirmed to deny anon/authenticated SELECT and INSERT outright.
anonymous_access_denied.status: PASS (via structural equivalence to Gate B, not a live Production anon probe)

rollback.reason: No issue found at any validation step; nothing to roll back
